The '''''Thranta''-class War Cruiser''' was one of the last [[Starship/Legends|starship]] classes manufactured by [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

==History==
Most of the ''Thranta''-class vessels were scrapped when Alderaan demilitarized after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Courage (Thranta-class War Cruiser)|''Courage'']], ''[[Fidelity]]'', and [[Valiant (Thranta-class War Cruiser)|''Valiant'']] were spared and assigned to escort the [[Alderaanian War Frigate]] ''[[Another Chance]]'', which had been modified into an armory ship.

''Valiant'' was later recovered by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Bacta War]] after being attracted to the beacon used by [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], which was the same one used by ''Another Chance''.
